name: C64 Standard
description: Standard Commodore 64 project with common equates and basic stub.

files.content:
// Project: {{PROJECT_NAME}}
.cpu _6502
* = {{START_ADDR}}

// BASIC stub: 10 SYS 2061 ($080D)
.byte $0B, $08, $0A, $00, $9E, $32, $30, $36, $31, $00, $00, $00

start:
    lda #$00
    sta $d020 // Border black
    sta $d021 // BG black

    ldx #$00
loop:
    lda message,x
    beq done
    jsr $ffd2 // CHROUT
    inx
    jmp loop

done:
    rts

message: .text "HELLO FROM {{PROJECT_NAME}}"
         .byte 0
